summary: The answer correctly routes B79 RMCD/PL questions to local project context under context/projects and knowledge/projects and identifies relevant optical observables. It appropriately caveats that the supplied context lacks a B79-specific node or project root, so exact B79 files/results cannot be claimed. Minor weakness: it imports broader tMoTe2 observables from nearby context without making fully explicit that these are general routing cues, not B79-specific evidence.
